stories.title: render_scene minimal Vulkan submission via ash + ANativeWindow
stories.verifiedBy: Death-pit #1 — 4-round Codex review with 8 cumulative blockers caught/fixed. Final CODEX_PASS at round-4 (commit 369ff50). Round 1 (worker 21111c8 warp-src + dfd6469 main): VK_SUBOPTIMAL_KHR ignored (ash 0.38 returns Ok(bool) not Err); queue_present cleanup ordering UB; driver POST_NOTIFICATIONS focus theft (codex repro got 83 frames vs claimed 7,418); validation layer .so untracked (fresh clone broken). Round 2 (worker abd71b9 warp-src + 492af6a/39283ca main): SHA-256 pin missing on validation layer fetch; permission grant assertion missing; exit codes only checked layer-absent. Round 3 (lead 815b8e2): SHA pin added at 4 verify points + computeSha256 helper; pm grant + dumpsys assertion + focus check; exit code matrix; tamper detection verified. Round 4 (lead 369ff50): exit code matrix collision (validation_clean=False bumped layer-absent from rc=3 to rc=4) decoupled; set +e/set -e wrap around Python parser to preserve cleanup. Device evidence: RFCY71LAFYE (Galaxy S25, Adreno 750, API 36) 60s capture 7,379 frames p50/p95/p99=8/9/9ms peak 122fps in 1s window; validation_layer.clean=true layer_loaded=true. Codex independently reproduced at 7,371 frames (within 0.1% variance).
acceptanceCriteria: warp-src/crates/warpui/src/platform/android/vulkan.rs (per ralplan §6 M2 row #3) implements WindowContext::render_scene by initializing VkInstance + VkSurfaceKHR (VK_KHR_android_surface) + VkSwapchainKHR + minimal renderpass + present queue submission
Renders single solid-color quad (clear-color test) on first frame; not yet textured grid (that is M2-S08)
Vulkan validation layers ON in debug build; zero validation warnings during 60-second steady run on flagship
Web search docs: ash crate Vulkan surface creation, ANativeWindow_fromSurface NDK API, VK_KHR_android_surface extension, M0 spikes/vulkan-surface-recreate prior art
Builds: cargo ndk -t arm64-v8a build -p warpui in warp-src/

Device verification on flagship (S24 Ultra or equivalent Adreno 730+): tools/scripts/test-render-scene.sh <serial> launches APK with android-host wired to warpui android backend, captures logcat showing Vulkan present queue submitted ≥60 times in 1 second
Codex review dispatched and PASS verdict received

stories.title: request_frame_capture (ash readback to bitmap)
stories.verifiedBy: 3-round Codex review with 6 cumulative blockers caught/fixed. Final CODEX_PASS at round-3 (warp-src bc7c5e7 + main 88a24d7+06f0435). Round 1 (worker ea3e4a0/f01425e): VK_SUBOPTIMAL_KHR ignored (already fixed in S04 spillover); HOST_READ memory barrier missing before vkMapMemory; queue_present after capture missing (WSI image leak — codex 6-cap repro got Vk(TIMEOUT) at #4); WindowContext::request_frame_capture trait callback was stub. Round 2 (worker 3ea752b/6c7da1a): per-image present-wait semaphore (one render_finished signaled for all swapchain images is not spec-safe — Vulkan guide on swapchain semaphore reuse); capture_to_callback held swapchain mutex during callback (re-entrant deadlock risk); driver focus assertion missed Bouncer/mInputRestricted (Knox-induced lockscreen; codex repro 10/0 captures). Round 3 (worker bc7c5e7/88a24d7): all 3 round-2 blockers structurally fixed — Vec<Semaphore> indexed by image_index in both vulkan.rs files with allocate/destroy in init/recreate/destroy paths; CapturedFrame built in inner scope with MutexGuard dropped before callback fire; 3 driver scripts get 4-tier reject (Bouncer/Keyguard/StatusBar/Shade exit 11; non-dev.warp.mobile exit 12; mInputRestricted=true exit 13; surfaceDestroyed-before-loop exit 14). Lead also added MainActivity FLAG_KEEP_SCREEN_ON (404535f), keep-awake heartbeat helper (93e47b6), and EXIT trap || true cleanup (post-codex-r3 nit). Device evidence on Galaxy S24 Ultra R5CX10VFFBA / Adreno 750 / API 36: 50-capture stress 50/50 PASS / 0 timeouts / 0 validation; codex independently reproduced 100-capture stress 100/100 PASS + rotation-during-capture-loop 50/50 PASS + RFCY71LAFYE M2-S04 60s smoke 7,602 frames 121fps p95=9ms validation clean. PNG output 1080x2340 RGBA mean (255,0,255).
acceptanceCriteria: warp-src/crates/warpui/src/platform/android/vulkan.rs (extension; lives alongside render_scene impl per ralplan §6 M2 row #3) implements WindowContext::request_frame_capture using vkCmdCopyImageToBuffer + memory mapping
Outputs raw RGBA bitmap and PNG-encoded variant (use image crate already in warpui deps if available, else add)
Web search docs: Vulkan readback patterns, vkCmdCopyImageToBuffer host-coherent memory, ash examples
Device run on flagship: capture single frame from M2-S04 render → adb pull → assert bitmap size matches expected dims and not all-black
Codex review dispatched and PASS verdict received

stories.title: TextLayoutSystem 2-method skeleton
stories.verifiedBy: Codex round-1 CODEX_PASS at warp-src commit a302bd5. No blocking findings. cosmic-text shaping pipeline (BidiParagraphs → ShapeLine::new → shape_line.layout) wired correctly per winit reference; empty-DB guard returns Line::empty()/TextFrame::empty() (correct for current state — no fonts loaded yet, that's M2-S07's job). 6 TODO blocks honestly disclosed and scoped to S07/S08/S10: glyph-run construction needs FontId↔fontdb::ID BiMap from S07; caret positions & chars_with_missing_glyphs same blocker; StyleAndFont→cosmic_text::Attrs translation needs TextStylesMap (winit/fonts.rs:719); TextAlignment Right/Center accepted but discarded (S08); max_height truncation accepted but unused (S08); locale hardcoded en-US (S10 IME wires Resources.getConfiguration().getLocales()). cosmic-text = warpdotdev fork rev 15198beb (v0.12.0, parity with desktop); fontdb 0.23.0 — both gated to [target.'cfg(target_os = "android")'.dependencies]. AndroidTextLayoutCore with RwLock<FontSystem> mirrors winit/fonts.rs:202 pattern. cargo ndk -t arm64-v8a check -p warpui: 0 errors, 33 warnings (same baseline). 3 host-side unit tests pass. Codex independently verified: empty-DB safety per pop-os/cosmic-text issue #243, dep gating correct (no desktop regression), no resource leak from let _ = layout drop, core/shim layering coherent.
acceptanceCriteria: Identify the 2 TextLayoutSystem methods needing real impl on android (cross-reference .omc/m0-artifacts/M0-platform-trait-delta.md)
warp-src/crates/warpui/src/platform/android/text_layout.rs implements those 2 methods using cosmic-text
Web search docs: cosmic-text Android usage, warp upstream linux/mac TextLayoutSystem implementations for parity
cargo ndk -t arm64-v8a check -p warpui succeeds; no warpui internal compile errors related to TextLayoutSystem
Codex review dispatched and PASS verdict received

stories.title: FontDB 15-method cosmic-text + Android system fonts (M2a-font sub-gate)
stories.verifiedBy: Codex round-1 CODEX_PASS at warp-src 70e472c + main 0bbace1. M2a-font sub-gate (per Plan Amendment 2) CLEARED. 15 FontDB methods implemented (only fallback_fonts returns Vec::new — cosmic-text Shaping::Advanced auto-resolves at shape time). Discovery via ASystemFontIterator NDK API 29+ (primary) + /system/fonts/ scan (fallback). On Galaxy S24 Ultra R5CX10VFFBA (Adreno 750, API 36): 358 fonts loaded across 197 families; CJK fallback found Samsung One UI's renamed 'SEC CJK SC' (= Noto Sans CJK SC, 16 SEC CJK / Noto Serif CJK families discovered). 'Hello, 世界' rendered with 9 glyphs / 0 missing / 11,138 composed pixels; visually inspected no tofu (codex pulled PNG and confirmed). Validation layer clean (W=0/E=0). 4 honest pivots: (1) Samsung CJK rename (fallback regex with Hanunoo/Myanmar guards); (2) adb shell am broadcast drops codepoints > U+007F via shell, used text_b64 base64 extra; (3) cosmic-text other.rs has empty fallback tables on Android — emulated unix.rs::script_fallback via per-script Family::Name spans (file upstream PR for M3); (4) cross-workspace duplication font_render.rs in main mirrors AndroidFontDB (M3 unification). Codex verified: cargo ndk check warpui 0 errors / 32 warnings (1 less than S06 baseline); cargo ndk check + cargo check warp-mobile-android-host PASS; PNG visually inspected. 6 non-blocking nits for S08: fallback_fonts empty acceptable; font_id_for_internal:467 read-then-write race tighten before S08; SubpixelMask/Color smoke test; CJK span hack file upstream; cross-workspace dup M3 unification.
acceptanceCriteria: warp-src/crates/warpui/src/platform/android/font.rs implements all 15 FontDB methods identified in M0-platform-trait-delta.md
Font discovery uses Android NDK font matcher (AFontMatcher_NDK API since API 29) OR scans /system/fonts/ + bundled assets
cosmic-text used for shaping/layout consistent with linux/mac backends
Web search docs: cosmic-text Android usage, AFontMatcher API, NDK font discovery, Noto fonts bundled with Android, warp upstream FontDB implementations
Device verification on flagship: render "Hello, 世界" — Latin glyphs and CJK glyphs both visible, no missing-glyph tofu boxes
Sub-gate evaluation: if cosmic-text + Android fonts cannot render CJK in 5 person-days post-S07 dispatch, fallback decision documented
Codex review dispatched and PASS verdict received

verifierConfig.rationale: User SOP from M0/M1: every worker deliverable goes through Codex review. User reinforced for M2: 「每一步都要搭配 codex 和網路搜索相關文檔和資訊」. Web docs lookup precedes implementation; Codex review precedes story passes:true.
